title: KANBAN MODEL: Select which image from files to feature.

posts.author: awmajcherk (Adam Majcherkiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to make a feature which allows us to decide which of the files is displayed in KANBAN view?

This is extremely helpful for our team, as each stage of production has an image associated with it and is often helpful for the team as a visual tool to quickly identify the stage and status of each order.
